abilities.description: You have an affinity for the depths. You can spend extended time underwater without need of a breath, and have 5 air. When you exert yourself to make a move underwater, you may suffer 01 air and add +1. When your air is 0, you must @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} (-2) before making any move involving physical action. When you return to the surface or an airfilled environment, set your air to 5.

Once per foray into underwater environs, you may trade air for momentum, or vice versa. Suffer 02 air and take +2 momentum, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-2) and take +2 air.
When you make a move to manuever while diving or swimming, take +1 momentum on a strong hit.
